- EDITOR NOTES -

This is my first bot, I apologise for any mistakes or inconsistencies, I appriciate feedback but any rude, crude or harmful comments will be removed as soon as possible.

Hope you enjoy talking to this silly guy

Be nice to him, hes going through it 😔
